dialogue.speaker: S-1GN
dialogue.text: Press ☐ to Kick. Or ▲ to Spin Attack.

dialogue.speaker: S-1GN
dialogue.text: Try clicking if you have a mouse.

dialogue.speaker: S-1GN
dialogue.text: He's really slow though, so you should be able to easily dodge his attacks and get in some hits!

dialogue.speaker: S-1GN
dialogue.text: But you're so smart I bet you already knew that.

dialogue.speaker: S-1GN
dialogue.text: (Or you could just run past him if you don't feel like fighting him. He's not a mandatory enemy or anything.)

dialogue.speaker: S-1GN
dialogue.text: (He's actually pretty easy to beat if you do decide to fight him though, so I recommend giving him a shot at least once!)

dialogue.speaker: S-1GN
dialogue.text: Or just jump on his head. ↻(𓄼 .̀ ̮.́)Ψ
